title: cineraria burkei
intro: Cineraria burkei, also known as King's Caper or Cape Marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cineraria burkei include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cineraria burkei can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
